ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position(s) played by the player (e.g., OF, 1B) */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player is currently on */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes or popularity score */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Batting handedness (R for right-handed, L for left-handed, S for switch-hitter) */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Throwing handedness (R for right-handed, L for left-handed) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium the team plays in */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Team playing the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "park_factor" REAL /* Venue-specific park factor */,
  "temperature_factor" REAL /* Temperature factor affecting the game */,
  "wind_factor" REAL /* Wind factor affecting the game */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the game */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitchers" (
  "pitcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitcher */,
  "pitcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the pitcher */,
  "woba" REAL /* Weighted on-base average (wOBA) */,
  "woba_diff" TEXT /* Difference in wOBA from a baseline */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Pitcher's handedness (R for right-handed, L for left-handed) */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned run average (ERA) */,
  "whip" REAL /* Walks plus hits per innings pitched (WHIP) */,
  "strikeouts_per_nine" REAL /* Strikeouts per nine innings */,
  "walks_per_nine" REAL /* Walks per nine innings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hitters" (
  "hitter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hitter */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player ID */,
  "woba" REAL /* Weighted on-base average (wOBA) */,
  "woba_diff" TEXT /* Difference in wOBA from a baseline */,
  "iso" REAL /* Isolated power (ISO) */,
  "iso_diff" TEXT /* Difference in ISO from a baseline */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Hitter's handedness (R for right-handed, L for left-handed, S for switch-hitter) */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hitter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hitters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player ID */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of the injury */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player ID */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game ID */,
  "pitcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pitcher ID */,
  "batting_order_confirmed" INTEGER /* Confirmed batting order position */,
  "batting_order_projected" INTEGER /* Projected batting order position */,
  "batting_order_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in confirmed and projected batting order positions */,
  "l10_fp" REAL /* 10-game moving average of fantasy points (FP) */,
  "l80_fp" REAL /* 80-game moving average of fantasy points (FP) */,
  "s_fp" REAL /* Season average of fantasy points (FP) */,
  "floor_fp" REAL /* Floor estimate of fantasy points (FP) */,
  "ceil_fp" REAL /* Ceiling estimate of fantasy points (FP) */,
  "proj_fp" REAL /* Projected fantasy points (FP) */,
  "proj_val" REAL /* Projected value */,
  "actual_fp" REAL /* Actual fantasy points (FP) */,
  "actual_val" REAL /* Actual value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_pitcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitcher_id") REFERENCES pitchers ("pitcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game ID */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team ID */,
  "win_probability" REAL /* Win probability for the team */,
  "projected_score" REAL /* Projected score for the team */,
  "actual_score" REAL /* Actual score for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
column_names: Position(s) played by the player (e.g., OF, 1B)
